TestCase z3Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    if (follow_case_elements == nullptr) {
        // Allocation failed, return original case
        return follow_case;
    }
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to ensure at least one element exists
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
            follow_case.elements[i] *= 0.5;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
